title: Kenyan Tagine Chicken with Dates
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish from Kenya, featuring chicken cooked in a rich tagine sauce with sweet dates.
instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the Kenyan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the dates, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake the tagine at 300°F (150°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
